name: Beautyrest Black Series 1
tagline: Luxury support built for side sleepers
description: Where luxury meets innovation. The Series 1 delivers individualized support, all-night heat transfer, and contouring pressure relief for a truly restful sleep.

name: Beautyrest Black Series 2
tagline: Instant pressure relief for all sleep styles
description: SurfaceTouch Gel Memory Foam quilted directly into the surface delivers instant pressure relief the moment you lie down.

name: Beautyrest Black Series 3
description: Self-Response Latex and 2K Nano Coils in the pillow top deliver enhanced, individualized support with responsive pressure relief for all sleep positions.

name: Beautyrest Black Series 4
description: The pinnacle of the Beautyrest Black line. 4K Nano Coils provide our most premium individualized support for an unmatched sleep experience.
